title: Kind's Anchor Optimizer
description: Smooth & Fast Anchoring Optimized Anchor Explosion, Handled Client Side for the Smoothest and Fastest Anchor Experience
body:
Kind’s Anchor Optimizer

---

--- # Is It allowed on CPVP Servers? Yes, this mod is fully permitted on PvPClub and other competitive Crystal pvp servers.The mod operates entirely on the client side, meaning it does not alter gameplay mechanics or provide an unfair competitive advantage. Instead, it optimizes anchor rendering and mitigates high latency issues by shifting specific processes from server dependent to client dependent execution. This ensures significantly smoother performance and a more stable experience for high ping players, while also enhancing overall anchor stability for players with low ping. For the ultimate setup, using this mod alongside the CuteBows mod is highly recommended, as their compatibility significantly enhances anchor performance and delivers an even smoother experience.

## Smooth & Fast Anchoring Kind’s Anchor Optimizer is a client-side Fabric mod that improves respawn anchor speed and responsiveness. ## Why Use This Mod? Respawn anchor PvP can feel delayed, inconsistent, or desynced when fights get fast. This mod improves the experience by: - Increasing anchor interaction speed for faster combos - Reducing delay between charge and detonation - Improving ghost-anchor handling for more reliable explosions - Preventing common glowstone misclick/misplacement behavior - Making anchor disappear feedback feel instant client-side - Keeping performance smoother with optimized explosion preview behavior - Improving consistency during high-speed CPvP and crystal fights ---

Performance Comparison (70ms)
